t_ch: 逗猫好玩。果然如阿雅所说，小飞儿悄悄回来了。
t_en: Teasing the cat is fun. Agy was right. Little Ciphy sneaked back on her own.

t_ch: 说吧，找我什么事来着？
t_en: So, what do you want from me?

t_ch: 你看看这些黑泥…
t_en: Take a look at this black mud...

t_ch: 你看看这「此世全部之恶」…
t_en: Take a look at "All the World's Evil" here...

t_ch: 有…有这么罪不可赦吗……
t_en: I—Is it really that unforgivable...

t_ch: 这可跟我没关系，别看轻我的品味哦！我只喜欢看起来亮晶晶、摇起来哗啦哗啦响的东西，对拿不到「好处」的坏事可不感兴趣。
t_en: Don't insult my character. I have nothing to do with this! I'm only interested in shiny things that make jingly noises. Any mischief that doesn't pay well is beneath me.

t_ch: 小飞儿确实是这个性格，阿雅说这就叫「懒」。
t_en: True. That's how Little Ciphy is. Agy said this is called "being lazy."

t_ch: 这怎么叫「懒」呢，这叫有计划有选择…缇宝阿姐等你长大以后就明白了。
t_en: How is this considered "lazy"? This is being strategic and having good judgment... Big sis Tribbie, you'll understand when you grow up.

t_ch: 这么说吧，我确实注意到有人干坏事了。既然是拿钱办事，需要我把人抓过来吗？
t_en: Tell you what — I did notice someone doing something they shouldn't. Since you're a paying customer, do you need me to catch them for you?

t_ch: 小飞儿怎么突然这么好心？
t_en: Little Ciphy found kindness in her heart?

t_ch: 这是好心吗？这是我收了钱。
t_en: Kindness? Nope. Simple transaction.

t_ch: 难道不用我亲自跑图去抓？
t_en: I don't have to leg it myself this time?

t_ch: 原来你是喜欢跑图的那种类型啊？
t_en: You're the map-exploring type, huh?

t_ch: 我来给大家都节约点时间吧。别眨眼，猫猫快递，马上就寄——
t_en: I'll save some time for everyone. Don't blink, the cat express will be right back—

t_ch: 一枚硬币高高抛起，赛飞儿消失了。片刻后，她接住了正在下落的硬币，并带回了…
t_en: A coin was tossed high in the air, and Cipher disappeared. After a moment, she caught the falling coin and brought it back...

t_ch: 钱，我拿到了；人，我抓住了。
t_en: I got my money, and here's your baddie.

t_ch: 诶？！什、什么情况？我刚才…是在这里吗？
t_en: Wh—What!? What's going on? Was I here just now?

t_ch: 啊，缇宝大人！这是在…「豹豹碰碰大作战」？
t_en: Oh, Lady Tribbie! You're doing the... Seal Slammers, yes?

t_ch: *我们*听说{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}会平等地惩罚每个毁坏宴会的家伙，对于这一点，你没有什么要说的吗？
t_en: We heard that {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#} punishes every party spoiler without prejudice. Do you have anything to say on this point?

t_ch: 对不起！我…我承认，我在浴盐里萃入了木屑、煤渣…黑夏果的汁水，把它们倒进了浴池。
t_en: I'm sorry! I... I confess. I mixed the wood shavings, coal dust, and juice from black summer berries into the bath salts. Then I poured it all into the waters.

t_ch: 可、可我这么做是有原因的——
t_en: B—But I did that for a reason!

t_ch: 我做了一个预言梦！但是梦的内容我不能说，打死我也不说……
t_en: I had a prophetic dream! But I can't say what it was, no matter how much you threaten me...

t_ch: …不能说？
t_en: ...You can't say?

t_ch: 缇宝阿姐别为难他了，毕竟…我也做了一个预言梦，而且，也不能说出预言的内容。
t_en: Big sis, go easy on him. I... also had a prophetic dream, of which I can't speak about.

t_ch: …你也不能说？
t_en: ...You too?

t_ch: 破誓是有代价的…
t_en: Vowbreakers will be punished...

t_ch: 呵呵，看来灰子你也做了一个不能说的那种预言梦吧。
t_en: Hah. Looks like Gray Mystery is in the same boat concerning this unspeakable dream.

t_ch: 预言…难道说，你是因为预言，才指名要和我组队吗……
t_en: A prophecy... Is that why you specifically wanted to team up with me?

t_ch: 请不要问得太仔细了，泡泡。
t_en: Please, Bubbles. I can't say more.

t_ch: 当然是因为泡泡实力强大啊…
t_en: It's because Bubbles is super strong, obviously.

t_ch: 可能是因为泡泡戴着墨镜，你看不出来，它的眼中划过了一丝阴翳。
t_en: Maybe it's the sunglasses, but you missed the brief gloom that crossed Bubbles' eyes.

t_ch: 嗷呜……
t_en: Awooo...

t_ch: 既是如此，*我们*也不方便细问，如果有可以讲出口的，请一定要告诉*我们*。
t_en: If that's the case, then we won't pursue it. However, if there's anything you can share, please do tell us.

t_ch: 走了走了！我们有缘再见了。不过嘛，有言在先——
t_en: Well then, job's done! We'll see each other when we see each other again. There's one last thing I want to say, though —

t_ch: 我可不会被*不讲道理的预言*左右，所以…我不会帮你的哟，灰子！
t_en: I certainly won't get dragged around by some arbitrary prophecy. So... you're on your own with this one, Gray Mystery!

t_ch: 短暂的休赛期结束，浴池被清理干净，受到影响的小海豹也得到了照顾。
t_en: The short break has ended. The baths are cleaned, and the affected baby seals are cared for.

t_ch: 感谢大家宽容理解！低温浴池已经恢复了原样，我们的比赛，现在继续——
t_en: Thank you all for your patience and understanding! The cold bath is restored, and now let's continue with the tournament —

t_ch: 来来来，我准备好了。
t_en: About time! I'm pumped and ready.

t_ch: 我缓一缓。
t_en: Can I have five more minutes?

t_ch: 啊！
t_en: Ah!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}选手，你可来了。你听说了吗？最近{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}的预言被传得沸沸扬扬的，说着什么，「金杯终破碎，无人成冠军」。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, you're finally back. Did you hear? Lately, {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa's{RUBY_E#} prophecy has been making waves. It went something like, "the golden trophy shatters with no champion."

t_ch: 不摆出来，更容易引起怀疑。
t_en: It's more likely to raise suspicions if you don't...

t_ch: 看不到奖杯，我就不比赛了。
t_en: If I can't see the trophy, I'm going to quit the competition.

t_ch: 按照*我们*的想法，与其为预言担惊受怕，不如堂堂正正地摆出来。退一万步，还有阿雅的金线呢！
t_en: According to our idea, instead of being worried and afraid of the prophecy, display it openly. If all else fails, we still have Agy's golden thread!

t_ch: 好，就听缇宝大人的。淘汰赛的时候，我们就拿出来。
t_en: Very well, if that is what Lady Tribbie wishes. Then we'll reveal it during the elimination rounds.

t_ch: 别管什么预言了，{NICKNAME}选手，你的比赛我都看了，你很有才华和实力。
t_en: Forget the prophecy, I watched all of your matches, {NICKNAME}. You have true talent and skill.

t_ch: 现在，<color=#dbc291ff>「豹豹碰碰大作战•究极进化版」</color>对你正式开放了。
t_en: So now, the <color=#dbc291ff>Seal Slammers: Ultimate Evolution</color> is officially open to you.

t_ch: 那是什么？
t_en: What's that?

t_ch: 「豹豹碰碰大作战」是出于欢乐的目的，让所有人都能享受小海豹冲撞的乐趣，换言之——轻轻松松没有压力。
t_en: Seal Slammers is designed so that everyone can enjoy the fun of bumping baby seals together. In other words, it's a stress-free experience.

t_ch: 「豹豹碰碰大作战•究极进化版」则是精心设计的挑战，每一关对战的小海豹都由大哥我亲自搭配，还有不同的难度等级，适合真正的强者。
t_en: Seal Slammers: Ultimate Evolution, however, includes carefully crafted challenges. I've arranged the baby seal lineup for each stage by hand, complete with an array of difficulties. A challenge for true masters.

t_ch: 不是要有<unbreak>20</unbreak>只小海豹吗？
t_en: Don't I need <unbreak>20</unbreak> baby seals for that?

t_ch: 大哥不是拘泥于规则的人，既然你通过了前面的考验，拥有多少只小海豹已经不重要了。
t_en: I'm not so stubborn about the rules. Since you've already passed the previous challenges, it hardly matters how many baby seals you have.

t_ch: 总之去找你就完事了？
t_en: So I just need to talk to you?

t_ch: 没错，你要是对自己的实力有自信，来浴场找我吧。
t_en: That's right. If you're confident about your skills, come find me at the baths.

t_ch: 淘汰赛就要开始了。不过，如果你有空，我们也可以去挑战一下阿水菲斯！你来决定。
t_en: The elimination rounds are about to begin, but if you have time to spare, we can also try challenging Aquafis. The decision is yours!

t_ch: 这可不是我泄露的啊！
t_en: This isn't something I leaked!

t_ch: 啊？原来{NICKNAME}早就听说这个预言了。
t_en: Ah? So {NICKNAME} already knows about the prophecy?

t_ch: 是吗？哈哈，还是第一次听说。
t_en: Really? Haha, first time I've heard this.

t_ch: 我们一直在纠结，要不要把「金海豹杯」摆出来。浴场里人多眼杂的，万一它像预言里那样发生什么意外，可怎么办？
t_en: We've been debating whether we should display the Gold Seal Cup. It's so crowded in the baths. What if something happens to it like the prophecy says?

t_ch: 观众们果然很在意奖杯呢！
t_en: As expected, the audience is very interested in the trophy!

t_ch: 但也有不少观众在质疑，怎么一直没有看到奖杯，是不是真的破碎了。
t_en: However, many in the audience are asking why they haven't seen the trophy yet, wondering if it's really shattered.

t_ch: 哇！小灰这么笃信自己能拿冠军吗？
t_en: Wow! Is Little Gray that sure about winning the championship?

t_ch: 该死！上了小贼的当。拜托了，{NICKNAME}，一定要把达利安的徽章追回来啊！
t_en: Darn it! I fell for the sneaky thief's trick. Please, {NICKNAME}, you've got to get Dorian's badge back!

t_ch: 哎哟哎哟，疼、疼，慢点。算您厉害！
t_en: Oh no, oh no, it hurts, slow down. Fine, you win, you're amazing!

t_ch: 可这枚徽章不巧被我吞进肚子里了，我努努力应该能排出来。
t_en: Unfortunately, I've swallowed the badge. If I try hard enough, I should be able to get it out.

t_ch: 不过，得给我点时间吧——至少需要五个工作日！
t_en: But I'll need some time — at least five business days!

t_ch: 别说了，真够恶心的……
t_en: Don't say that, it's downright disgusting...

t_ch: 徽章咱不要了，直接比赛吧。
t_en: Forget the badge, let's just get to the competition.

t_ch: 不错，咱们也不是那种规矩死板的比赛，达利安选手，准备开始比赛吧？
t_en: Well, we're not the type of competition to stick strictly to the rules. Contestant Dorian, are you ready to begin?

t_ch: …达利安，不想比赛了。
t_en: ...Dorian doesn't want to compete anymore.

t_ch: 要是弃赛，我就赢咯？
t_en: So if you forfeit, does that mean I win?

t_ch: 不能逃避，不能逃避…
t_en: You can't escape, you can't escape...

t_ch: 我希望出战选手，<color=#dbc291ff>更换为巴特鲁斯</color>。
t_en: I'd like to substitute the contestant, <color=#dbc291ff>replace with Bartholos</color>.

t_ch: 达利安选手！这不是正中下怀了吗？
t_en: Dorian! Isn't this just what they were hoping for?

t_ch: 偶遇{NICKNAME}，强如怪物，我自知拼尽全力，无法战胜。
t_en: I ran into {NICKNAME}, as strong as a beast. I know even if I tried my best, I can't win.

t_ch: 巴特鲁斯，你要为我，偷下胜利，作为补偿。
t_en: Bartholos, take the victory for me, as my compensation.

t_ch: 桀桀桀，不就是怕自己输得太丢份，想让我替你赢一场吗？
t_en: Hehehe, you're just afraid of losing face and want me to win it for you, huh?

t_ch: 话都说到这个份上了，那我——参加比赛就是了。
t_en: Well, since you've made it so clear, then I'll — just enter the competition.

t_ch: 那就比吧，反正都是手下败将。
t_en: Let's fight then. After all, you'll all lose to me.

t_ch: 可恶，是新的小海豹指挥官。
t_en: Darn, it's the new baby seal commander.

t_ch: 我不同意，我并非无法战胜！
t_en: I disagree. I'm not invincible!

t_ch: …别谦虚了，{NICKNAME}选手，恐怕巴特鲁斯也未必能让你使出全力。
t_en: ...Don't be humble, {NICKNAME}. Even Bartholos might not be able to bring out your full power.

t_ch: 既然征得双方同意，我们就破例一次，临时更换比赛选手，让诸位尽兴！
t_en: Since both sides agree, we'll make an exception this time and temporarily swap the contestants, so everyone can have a good time!

t_ch: 大地兽席地而坐。如同沉默的大地一般，它一言不发。
t_en: The dromas sits motionless, as silent as the earth itself, saying nothing.

t_ch: 据说这是它「非暴力、不合作」的抗议方式。
t_en: It's said to be its way of protesting, "non-violence, non-cooperation."

t_ch: 我有红土饲料，你能离开吗？
t_en: I've got some Redsoil Feed, could you leave now?

t_ch: 呜嗡、呜嗡——
t_en: Grumph, grumph—

t_ch: 大地兽不予理会。
t_en: The dromas remains unresponsive.

t_ch: 哎呀呀，据说因为「山之民」达利安被「贼灵」替代了，大地兽感到不满，特来抗议哪！
t_en: Ah, they say that because Dorian, the Mountain Dweller, was replaced by the Spirithief, the dromas is upset and has come to protest!

t_ch: 特地选在休赛期出现，也算是比较友善的抗议吧。
t_en: It chose the off-season to make its appearance, which is a relatively friendly form of protest, I suppose.

t_ch: 如果*我们*没猜错…这就是预言中的「巨兽卧沉渊」吧？
t_en: If we're not mistaken... this is the "giant beast rests in the abyss" mentioned in the prophecy, right?

t_ch: 有请预言专家缇宁大人！
t_en: Let's call on the prophecy expert, Lady Trinnon!

t_ch: 所以，这预言是真的吗？
t_en: So, is this prophecy real?

t_ch: 预言中提到「黑潮蚀清波」，浴池就被黑色浴盐污染了。
t_en: The prophecy said "black tide muddles clear waters," and the bath had been tainted with black bath salts.

t_ch: 预言中提到「巨兽卧沉渊」，大地兽就出现在这里了。
t_en: It mentioned "giant beast rests in the abyss," and here the dromas stands before us.

t_ch: 这…这预言听着很真啊！
t_en: This... this prophecy feels too real!

t_ch: 这是因为，人心会被预言煽动，把事情推向「当众预言成真」的结果。
t_en: That's because the prophecy has stirred the people's hearts, causing things to incline toward "the prophecy fulfilling itself before everyone's eyes."

t_ch: 在翁法罗斯的历史里，也有过太多无论预言真假，都可能造成「真实的冲突」的事情。
t_en: In Amphoreus's history, there were plenty of things that could cause "real conflicts," regardless if the prophecies were true or not.

t_ch: 我明白了，只要预言散播得足够广，无形之中就会有人去实现它，使它应验…？
t_en: I understand now. As long as the prophecy is spread far and wide, someone out there is bound to fulfill it, making it come true...?

t_ch: 这可怎么办？前面的两条已经依次应验，现在只差最后一条了——「金海豹杯」真的会碎掉吗？
t_en: What should we do? The two previous prophecies have already come true, there's only the last one left — will the Gold Seal Cup really be broken?

t_ch: 有裁缝女和缇宝阿姐两位半神坐镇，你们怕什么？
t_en: With our two demigods, the seamstress and big sis around, what are you afraid of?

t_ch: 感受到大家炽热的目光。
t_en: I can feel everyone's eager, burning stares.

t_ch: 各位，我有一个翁法罗斯梦！
t_en: Everyone, I have a vision of Amphoreus!

t_ch: …对不起，我还是不能讲出来。
t_en: ...Sorry, but I still can't share it.

t_ch: 那我就狠狠挠你胳肢窝，直到你讲出来……
t_en: Then I'll tickle you until you spill it...

t_ch: 请相信*我们*，你不会承受任何代价。
t_en: Please believe in us. We won't let you pay any price.

t_ch: 一番心理建设后，你将预言梦的全程讲了出来…然而，你并没有变成一只小海豹。
t_en: After some mental preparation, you explained the entire process of the prophetic dream... Yet, you didn't transform into a baby seal.

t_ch: （竟然无事发生…）
t_en: (And... nothing happened...)

t_ch: 果然，变成小海豹的「代价」也是虚假的。但小灰会遇见奇美拉泡泡，和一位身手矫健的「游侠」，一同对抗金杯破碎的命运？
t_en: Of course, the "price" of becoming a baby seal is false too. However, will Little Gray meet Chimera Bubbles and a nimble "ranger," to defy the destiny of the breaking trophy?

t_ch: 嗷呜～尽管了解了{NICKNAME}不能说出口的原因，但现在泡泡心里还是很受伤……
t_en: Awoo~ Even though I now understand why {NICKNAME} can't speak of it, I still feel a little hurt inside...

t_ch: 我们可以悄悄替换掉奖杯！
t_en: We could secretly swap out the trophy!

t_ch: 直接把奖杯发给我如何？
t_en: How about just handing the trophy to me directly?

t_ch: 不，比赛的冠军还是得通过比赛决出。
t_en: No, the champion has to be crowned through the competition itself.

t_ch: 找个地方把奖杯藏起来吧。
t_en: Let's hide the trophy somewhere safe.

t_ch: 马上就是冠军赛了…不能一直藏下去。
t_en: The championship is almost here... we can't hide it forever.

t_ch: 不如我亲手将奖杯打碎吧。
t_en: What if I shatter the trophy myself?

t_ch: 别放弃啊，让我们再想想。
t_en: Don't give up just yet, let's brainstorm some more.

t_ch: 你们备好一个赝品奖杯，我用一瞬间的神速把真正的奖杯替换下来。这样一来，就算有人听信了假预言去搞破坏，也不知道破坏掉的是假的咯！
t_en: Prepare a fake trophy, and I'll use a single instant to switch it with the real trophy. That way, even if anyone believes the false prophecy and breaks the trophy, they won't know that they've broken a fake!

t_ch: 但前提是解除*裁缝女的金线*——它只信赖你们密底斯泰歇三兄弟呀！
t_en: But the issue is dispelling the seamstress's golden thread — it only listens to you three Mythemis brothers!

t_ch: 解除金线好说，不过奖杯的位置这么显眼，要是不想被人发现我们的动作……
t_en: Dispelling the golden thread is straightforward, but the trophy is so conspicuous — if we don't want anyone to notice what we're up to...

t_ch: 各位，泡泡有一个想法，既能把大家的注意力吸引过来，又能打破{NICKNAME}的预言梦。
t_en: Everyone, Bubbles has an idea, it'll draw everyone's attention and also break {NICKNAME}'s prophetic dream.

t_ch: ——我，决定退出{NICKNAME}的队伍。
t_en: —I've decided to leave {NICKNAME}'s team.

t_ch: 我好像猜到了…但是为什么？
t_en: I think I know why... but what's the reason?

t_ch: 我、我哪里做得不好吗？
t_en: Did I... did I do something wrong?

t_ch: 泡泡，噢，我的泡泡，别走～
t_en: Bubbles, oh my dear Bubbles, don't go—!

t_ch: 你看着泡泡，神情复杂……
t_en: You look at Bubbles, your expression complicated...

t_ch: 嗷呜，泡泡的决定绝不是临时起意，{NICKNAME}不必挽留了，希望你能好好利用……
t_en: Awoo... I definitely didn't just decide this on a whim, {NICKNAME}. No need to beg me to stay — hopefully you'll make good use of this chance...

t_ch: 太感人了！为了泡泡的良苦用心，我们举办一场隆重的转队发布会吧。赛飞儿大人，到时候我会准备好赝品，这个机会就交给你了。
t_en: How touching! In light of Bubbles's efforts, let's hold a grand press conference for the team transfer. Lady Cipher, I'll have prepared a replica by then. We'll leave the switch to you.

t_ch: 嗷呜…{NICKNAME}，我知道你有话要说，不如我们在发布会上聊吧。
t_en: Awoo... {NICKNAME}, I know you've got something to say — how about we discuss it at the press conference?

t_ch: 什么？又出现了新的预言？
t_en: What? There are new prophecies?

t_ch: 嗯，除了「金杯终破碎，无人成冠军」，最近*我们*又从浴场观众口中分别听到了「黑潮蚀清波」、「巨兽卧沉渊」……
t_en: Indeed. Apart from "the golden trophy shatters with no champion," we have heard two more at the baths: "black tide muddles clear waters" and "giant beast rests in the abyss"...

t_ch: 别担心，大家，*我们*以半神之名保证，所谓「三道灾厄」是假的。
t_en: Don't worry, everyone. In the name of the demigods, we assure you that these "three calamities" are merely fabrications.

t_ch: 不过，*我们*无法预料，奥赫玛的公民当中会不会有人顺应预言去行动。而且目前听到的内容，恐怕还并非预言的全貌。
t_en: However, we cannot foresee whether any Okhema citizens might act on these prophecies. Besides, what we've heard may only be part of the whole prophecy.

t_ch: （法吉娜的预言梦中，还包括「寻找伙伴」，以及……）
t_en: (In Phagousa's prophetic dream, there was also "look for your companions," and...)

t_ch: 灰子，你到底听到了什么预言？说出来大家对照一下？
t_en: Come on, Gray Mystery, what prophecy did you hear exactly? Why don't you share it with everyone?

t_ch: 预言里出现了自相矛盾的部分，这部分倒是似真似假……
t_en: There are contradictory elements in the prophecy, making it hard to distinguish truth from fiction...

t_ch: 这个「游侠」的称号听着好耳熟，不会是说我吧？
t_en: Rangers? That title rings a bell. Are they referring to me?

t_ch: 难道我真的要被*不讲道理的预言*左右，跟你一起充当拯救奖杯的英雄？啧！还真是无聊的过家家。
t_en: Do I really have to let some arbitrary prophecy push me into playing hero with you to save some trophy? Tch! What a childish game.

t_ch: 你都收了缇宝的钱了…
t_en: Since you took Tribbie's payment anyway...

t_ch: 帮都帮了，再帮一回？
t_en: You've helped once, what's one more time?

t_ch: 两位有什么好的计划吗？
t_en: Got any good ideas, you two?

t_ch: 不错！灰子，和我想的一样。
t_en: Great minds think alike, eh, Gray Mystery?

t_ch: 近日！随着「豹豹碰碰大作战」赛程日趋火热，小奇美拉「泡泡」的转队风波成为公民们关注的舆论焦点。
t_en: Breaking news! As Seal Slammers heats up, the uproar over Bubbles the little chimera's team transfer has become a hot topic among citizens.

t_ch: 浴场的观众将目光紧紧地盯在你们的身上。
t_en: The audience at the baths stares at you intently.

t_ch: 这是一场荣誉与金钱的角逐，还是一场梦想和野心的纠葛呢？今天我们有幸采访到了泡泡和{NICKNAME}，来跟大家打个招呼——
t_en: Is this a contest of honor and wealth, or a clash of dreams and ambition? Today we're fortunate to interview Bubbles and {NICKNAME}. Say hello to everyone—

t_ch: 大家好，我是奇美拉泡泡。
t_en: Hello everyone, I'm Bubbles the Chimera.

t_ch: …大家好，我好像不太好。
t_en: ...Hello, everyone. I'm... not feeling so great.

t_ch: 大家好，我是{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Hello, everyone. I'm {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 泡泡你好，方便透露一下「转队」的原因是什么吗？是遇到了不公正的对待、严苛的合约条款、有摩擦的豹友关系，还是…有其他尚未披露的细节？请告诉我。
t_en: Bubbles, could you tell us the reason behind your team transference? Was it unfair treatment, a harsh contract, conflicts with teammates, or...some other undisclosed details? Fill us in.

t_ch: 嗷呜？都没有，{NICKNAME}一直是我信赖的伙伴！
t_en: Awoo? None of that. {NICKNAME} has always been a partner I trust!

t_ch: 只是，在和缇宁大人交手后，我有了新的感触……
t_en: It's only that... after having faced off against Lady Trinnon, I had some new insights...

t_ch: 嗷呜…{NICKNAME}你知道吗，泡泡一直很怀疑，{NICKNAME}选我做伙伴，真的是因为相信我吗？
t_en: Awoo... You know, {NICKNAME}, Bubbles has always been suspicious... Did you choose me as your partner because you believed in me?

t_ch: 虽然一路我们都在赢，但得知这是「预言的安排」后，泡泡很失落……
t_en: I know we've been winning all the way, but knowing this is "the prophecy's arrangement," Bubbles feels disappointed...

t_ch: 泡泡想凭实力成为{NICKNAME}的伙伴，而不是靠预言。尤其是见证了缇宁大人参赛的心路历程后，泡泡认为，自己也应该像她那样「独当一面」！
t_en: Bubbles wants to use their own true potential to become {NICKNAME}'s partner, not just because of the prophecy. Especially after witnessing Lady Trinnon's motivations and experiences during the competition. Bubbles thinks that they should be like her and assume personal responsibility!

t_ch: 离开你以后，泡泡会用新的实绩证明自己！让{NICKNAME}发自内心地认可泡泡。
t_en: Once Bubbles leaves you, Bubbles will prove themself with new accomplishments! This will let {NICKNAME} recognize me wholeheartedly.

t_ch: 原来如此，我尊重你的选择。
t_en: I see. I respect your choice.

t_ch: 够爽快，泡泡果然没看错你。
t_en: Right on. I knew I was right about you!

t_ch: 不！泡泡你带我走吧，泡泡…
t_en: No! Bubbles, take me with you, Bubbles...

t_ch: …{NICKNAME}…不要再说挽留的话了。
t_en: ...{NICKNAME}... please don't ask me to stay anymore.

t_ch: 虽然泡泡戴着墨镜你可能看不见，但它已经泪眼朦胧了。
t_en: Although I'm wearing sunglasses, and you might not notice, tears are welling in my eyes.

t_ch: 墨镜是我的保护色！在下只是个笨拙的奇美拉…但在下心意坚决……
t_en: The sunglasses are my camouflage! I'm just a clumsy chimera... but my resolve is firm...

t_ch: 那么泡泡，有什么话想对{NICKNAME}选手，以及你曾经的豹友们说吗？
t_en: So Bubbles, is there anything you want to say to {NICKNAME} or your former teammates?

t_ch: 你知道的，有时候做出决定总是很难，经过了很多轮对战后的思考，我决定把我的天赋带到风堇的小海豹战队。
t_en: You know, making a decision can be tough. After a lot of matches and reflection, I decided to take my talents to Hyacine's baby seal squad.

t_ch: 至于「大力海豹」，以及其他小海豹们，我祝它们一切顺利！赛场见。
t_en: As for the "Mega Seals" and the other baby seals, I wish them all the best! See you on the field.

t_ch: 最后一个问题，离开{NICKNAME}，你有信心拿到「金海豹杯」吗？
t_en: One last question: After leaving {NICKNAME}, are you confident you can win the "Gold Seal Cup"?

t_ch: 当然，我想赢下冠军，我觉得我能在那里做到。
t_en: Of course, I want to win the championship. I think I can pull it off there.

t_ch: 所以，「金海豹杯」…金海豹…糟了！那么大一个奖杯不见了！
t_en: So, the "Gold Seal Cup"... the golden seal... Oh no! That huge trophy is gone!

t_ch: 原计划是…是这样的吗？
t_en: Was that... was that how it was supposed to go?

t_ch: 临近休赛期结束，「替换奖杯」的计划彻底宣告失败。
t_en: As we neared the end of the off-season, the "trophy swap" plan ended in utter failure.

t_ch: …赛飞儿阁下在我解除了金线的固定之后，她就带着奖杯从我眼前瞬间消失了。
t_en: ... After I dispelled the golden thread's tether, Lady Cipher vanished from in front of me with the trophy.

t_ch: 我还在原地等赛飞儿阁下回来呢，结果、结果她再也没有回来了。
t_en: I stood there waiting for Lady Cipher to return, but in the end... she never came back.

t_ch: 阿格莱雅大人你看，这位黄金裔大人究竟是何方神圣……
t_en: Lady Aglaea, what do you think — just who is this Chrysos Heir...?

t_ch: …我早就觉得赛飞儿很可疑了。
t_en: ...I've long suspected that Cipher was suspicious.

t_ch: 「诡计」的半神，赛飞儿，她的出现就是「诡计」本身。
t_en: Cipher is the demigod of "Trickery" — her presence is trickery in itself.

t_ch: 阿格莱雅你的防猫装置失效了…
t_en: Aglaea, your cat repellent device has failed...

t_ch: 我从未指望过金线能防住翁法罗斯最狡猾的贼——赛飞儿。
t_en: I never expected the golden thread could stop Amphoreus's most cunning thief — Cipher.

t_ch: 事情的起因、经过，我已经听吾师说过了。
t_en: I've already heard the whole story from my teachers.

t_ch: 哼，千年的时光过去，她做事的风格还是没有变。
t_en: Hmph. A thousand years have passed, and her methods still haven't changed.

t_ch: 在被揭穿之前，「诡计」有着接近「神谕」的效力——换句话说，从一开始她就盯上了「金海豹杯」，随后她用谎言给你展示了一个「预言梦」。
t_en: Until it's exposed, "Trickery" is almost like a prophecy in effect — that is, she targeted the Gold Seal Cup from the start, then used falsehoods to show you a prophetic dream.

t_ch: 「诡计」从比赛前就开始了？
t_en: Her "Trickery" started before the competition?

t_ch: 没错，从你那荒唐的梦开始。
t_en: Exactly. It began with that ridiculous dream of yours.

t_ch: 那「金杯终破碎」的预言呢？
t_en: What about the prophecy that "the golden trophy shatters"?

t_ch: 它从始至终都不会破碎。
t_en: It was never going to break.

t_ch: 她编出了「三大灾厄」的预言，并将谎言藏在真言之中，让它们传播开来。
t_en: She fabricated a prophecy of "three great calamities," then hid lies among truths to let them spread.

t_ch: 随后又假装成「识破谎言」的好伙伴，让你们亲手将她偷不走的奖杯交给了她。
t_en: Then she pretended to be an ally who could "see through lies," tricking you into handing her the trophy she couldn't otherwise steal.

t_ch: 而现在，狡猾的小贼已经拿到她的玩具，不会再出现了。
t_en: And now, the cunning thief has her prize in hand. She won't appear again.

t_ch: 摆放奖杯的地方空荡荡，像是赛飞儿的嘲弄：嘿！你们争夺的东西，早进了我的宝库！
t_en: The spot for the trophy is completely empty, as if Cipher is mocking you: "Hey, the thing you fought over is already in my treasure trove!"

t_ch: 没看好奖杯，我们兄弟实在愧疚，请阿格莱雅大人原谅。
t_en: We failed to secure the trophy properly, and we brothers feel truly ashamed. Lady Aglaea, please forgive us.

t_ch: 也许…在冠军赛到来前，我们还有找到赛飞儿的可能性……
t_en: Perhaps... there's still a chance to find Cipher before the championship begins...

t_ch: 无妨，先以筹备比赛要紧。若因为奖杯失窃办不成比赛，就顾此失彼了。
t_en: No worries. Our first priority is getting ready for the match. If we can't hold the match because the trophy's stolen, that'd be a total loss.

t_ch: 被谎言梦欺骗，信赖的伙伴又离开了自己，{NICKNAME}，你还好吗？
t_en: You were deceived by a dream of lies, and your trusted partner left you — {NICKNAME}, are you alright?

t_ch: 虽然奖杯没有了，但还有冠军！
t_en: Even though the trophy's gone, the championship title is still up for grabs!

t_ch: 我喜欢你的乐观。
t_en: I like your optimism.

t_ch: 有些失落，但是比赛还得继续。
t_en: I'm a bit disappointed, but the match has to go on.

t_ch: 抱歉，我能感受到你的失落。
t_en: I'm sorry. I can sense how let down you feel.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，不如听听我的预言吧。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, why not hear my prophecy?

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>你一定会惩罚窃取奖杯的小贼，夺回你应得的荣誉。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>You will surely punish the trophy thief and reclaim the honor that's rightfully yours.</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>你一定会找回离开自己的伙伴，与它再次并肩作战。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>You will definitely find the partner who left you and fight alongside them again.</color>

t_ch: 这是{RUBY_B#阿格莱雅}「浪漫」的半神{RUBY_E#}予你的预言，你尽可以相信我。
t_en: This is the prophecy bestowed upon you by {RUBY_B#Aglaea}demigod of Romance{RUBY_E#}. You can believe me.

t_ch: 谢谢你，阿格莱雅。
t_en: Thank you, Aglaea.

t_ch: 现在，专注于当下的比赛吧。
t_en: Now, focus on the upcoming match.

t_ch: 在几方期待、几方忐忑的心理中，时间照常流逝，来到了冠军赛。
t_en: With everyone's mixed anticipation and anxiety, time passed normally, and the championship arrived.

t_ch: 早些时候，在星穹列车上。
t_en: Earlier, on the Astral Express...

t_ch: 啊，{NICKNAME}乘客来了，我们刚准备找你呢帕。
t_en: Oh, Passenger {NICKNAME} is here, we were just looking for you!

t_ch: 话说回来，刚才有艘星际和平公司的货船送来了一份包裹，里面是这个写着「致银河球棒侠」箱子——应该是给你的。
t_en: Say, a freight skiff from the IPC just dropped off a package. Inside was a box labeled "To the Galactic Baseballer" — I assume it's meant for you.

t_ch: 看上去很帅气。
t_en: Looks pretty neat.

t_ch: 是啊，造型很有科技感，不知道是做什么用的。
t_en: Yeah, it has this really sleek tech vibe. I'm curious what it's for.

t_ch: 我的粉丝总是很热情。
t_en: My fans can be quite enthusiastic.

t_ch: 看上面的公司标志，应该不是粉丝礼物。
t_en: The IPC's insignia is on it, so it's probably not a fan gift.

t_ch: 应该等着我一起拆快递。
t_en: You should have waited for me before opening it.

t_ch: 它是寄给星穹列车的，结果打开之后才知道是给你的。
t_en: It was addressed to the Astral Express, though I only realized it was for you after opening it.

t_ch: 这万一是个炸弹怎么办…
t_en: What if it's actually a bomb...

t_ch: 你也太谨慎了。别担心，我做过安全检查。
t_en: That's a bit paranoid. Relax, I already ran a security check.

t_ch: 总之，既然正主来了，我们就一起把它打开看看吧——
t_en: Either way, since the actual receiver is here, let's open it up—

t_ch: 你打开箱盖，箱子内的屏幕也一并亮起。
t_en: When you lift the lid, a screen inside flickers to life.

t_ch: …喂喂，信号测试，一二三四五六七——哦哦，有画面了！看来星际和平物流还是靠谱的，回头得给他们点个赞。
t_en: ...Testing, testing, one two three four five six seven — oh nice, video's working! Looks like Interastral Peace Express really knows their stuff. Definitely giving them a thumbs up.

t_ch: 你好啊，无名客{NICKNAME}，还有列车组的成员们。我是丹克西，从遥远的帕拉黛星向你们发来问候。
t_en: Greetings, Nameless {NICKNAME} and other crew members of the Astral Express. This is Danksi, calling from the distant world of Paradoxe.

t_ch: 你找我们做什么？
t_en: What do you need from us?

t_ch: 咳咳…我开发了一款以星穹列车为题材的游戏。换句话说，它是我为星穹列车献上的一份心意。
t_en: Ahem... I developed an Astral-Express-themed game. In other words, it's my little homage for the Astral Express.

t_ch: 我们成名人了？
t_en: So we're famous now?

t_ch: 当然！连入银轨的世界谁会没听过星穹列车？谁又会不知道无名客呢？
t_en: Absolutely! Every world connected to the silver rail knows about the Astral Express! And everyone knows about the Nameless!

t_ch: <size=28>来体验一下吧！我一直都很喜欢你们的故事来着！</size>
t_en: <size=28>Try it out, please! I've always loved following your stories!</size>

t_ch: 你们在做什么？
t_en: What are you people up to?

t_ch: 维护必要的仪式感——原本我打算带大伙享受些咖啡和茶点，但是被一致拒绝了。
t_en: Maintain a necessary sense of ceremony — I wanted to bring everyone to enjoy some coffee, tea, and pastry, but it was unanimously rejected.

t_ch: 根据智库记载，过去的无名客们每完成一站旅程，就会举办一场开拓庆典。有时是茶话会，有时是厢内赛跑，有时甚至是骑士竞技……
t_en: According to the data bank, past Nameless members would throw a Trailblaze celebration after each stop. Sometimes, it's a tea party, sometimes it's a race, and sometimes even a knightly joust...

t_ch: 后来列车的乘客人数逐渐减少，这项传统也就不怎么被提及了。
t_en: But the number of passengers eventually waned, so this tradition has faded out.

t_ch: 帕拉黛星？是哪里？
t_en: Paradoxe? Where is that?

t_ch: 我听说过帕拉黛星。那里原本是一个信奉「纯美」的星球，后来与星际和平娱乐签订契约，成了公司旗下的文化产业基地。
t_en: I've heard of Paradoxe. It was a planet that followed the Beauty before signing a contract with the Interastral Peace Entertainment, turning it into a cultural industry base under the IPC.

t_ch: 是啊，我的家族原本是帕拉黛星最受欢迎的艺术世家，出产过许多剧作。
t_en: That's right. My family used to be the most popular artistic aristocracy on Paradoxe with many theater works under our belt.

t_ch: 后来大伙都去看公司的《鸡窝头侦探》和《流星怪盗卢布朗》了，我们家也就逐渐没落了……
t_en: However, everyone watched the IPC's Tousled Detective and Leblanc: The Meteor Thief, so my family gradually declined...

t_ch: 游戏的试玩包就在这台机器里。它搭载着新款脑波系统，能让你全身心地投入虚拟世界…硬件方面已经做到最好了。
t_en: The game's demo package is in this device. It uses cutting-edge brainwave tech for full virtual immersion... Hardware-wise, it's the best you can get.

t_ch: 顺带一提，<color=#dbc291ff>我把初始角色都设置成了列车组成员</color>。
t_en: Also, <color=#dbc291ff>I've made all Initial Characters Express Crew members</color>.

t_ch: 倒是挺有仪式感的，正好赶上了「开拓」庆典……
t_en: That does add a dramatic value, just in time for the Trailblaze Celebration...

t_ch: 游戏，启动！
t_en: Game on!

t_ch: 呵呵，不如就把它当成庆典的主题游戏吧。
t_en: Heheh, why not make it the featured game of the ceremony.

t_ch: 小三月发消息说她很快就到，{NICKNAME}，不如就由你先开始吧。
t_en: March said that she'll be here soon, {NICKNAME}, why don't we start with you?

t_ch: 若能借此机会重启「开拓」庆典，倒也是一件妙事。
t_en: If we can take this opportunity to restart the Trailblaze Ceremony, that'll be wonderful.

t_ch: 好久没玩这种小众独立游戏了，希望它的难度不会太高。
t_en: It's been a while since I played this type of niche indie game. I hope it's not too difficult.

t_ch: 我不排斥电子游戏。当然，也算不上擅长。
t_en: I don't dislike video games. Of course, I'm not exactly good at them either.

t_ch: 列车很少收到这么有趣的礼物，列车长也很好奇帕。
t_en: It's rare to receive such an interesting present in the Express, Pom-Pom thinks that it's unique.

t_ch: 没什么事的话，就来玩「星铁☆WORLD」吧——我刚起的名字。
t_en: Got a minute? Come try "Star Rail WORLD" — just came up with that name.

t_ch: 我要玩，我现在就要玩。
t_en: Let's play then. Like, right now.

t_ch: 我想和你聊聊。
t_en: Can we talk for a bit?

t_ch: 毕竟你们是IP版权方，聊上一千个系统时也没关系！
t_en: Sure, you're the IP owners. We can talk as long as you want, even a thousand system hours!

t_ch: 这个箱子到底是什么？
t_en: Explain to me again how it works?

t_ch: 哼哼~有没有想过，为什么游戏里会出现那么多你熟知的形象？说实话，其中有些面孔我也是第一次见。
t_en: Well, notice all those familiar faces in the game? Truth is, some are new even to me.

t_ch: 答案是——这台机器安装了业务巩固部的「截稿日辅助处理系统」。它可以激发、读取并记录人脑内的灵感，将它们形成场景，是创作者的不二帮手……
t_en: Here's why — it's equipped with the Business Consolidation Department's "Deadline Assistant Processing System." It captures, reads, and records creative inspiration right from your mind, turning them into scenes. Perfect for any creator...

t_ch: 这些灵感会储存在设备里，之后传输给我。可以说，你玩这个游戏的过程，就是在为我提供素材。
t_en: The device stores all that inspiration and sends it my way. So really, you're helping me gather material by playing.

t_ch: 你居然还用公司的产品？
t_en: So you're using IPC products yourself?

t_ch: 没办法，光凭我自己做不到嘛。有句星际格言怎么说的来着？「师夷长技以制夷」。
t_en: Well, I can't develop everything by myself, can I? You know the old Interastral saying: "Use your rivals' strengths against them."

t_ch: 公司科技，天下第一！
t_en: Nothing beats IPC tech!

t_ch: 我承认，现在的话，是公司比较强…但之后我会走出自己的路！
t_en: Sure, IPC might be ahead now... but I'll find my own path eventually!

t_ch: 总之，你只需要享受游戏就好，其他的我来考虑。
t_en: Anyway, just enjoy the game. Leave the rest to me.

t_ch: 为什么游戏是个嘉年华？
t_en: What's with the carnival theme?

t_ch: 咱这游戏的原型是「星际文明成果展示大会」，每个琥珀纪都会在庇尔波因特举办两次。
t_en: This game is inspired by "Interastral Civilization Achievement Exhibition," an event held twice each Amber Era at Pier Point.

t_ch: 届时，受到邀请的各大星球都会拿出自己的特产，在会场上交流、买卖，热闹极了。至于为什么选它作题材……
t_en: During the event, all the invited planets bring their specialties to trade and share. It's pretty exciting. Now, the reason I chose this theme...

t_ch: 咳咳，其实是因为我没钱，机器的算力只能支持一个场景…不过这倒也是大伙喜欢的题材。
t_en: *ahem* Truth is, I'm short on funds, and the hardware can only process one scene... but people seem to like it.

t_ch: 为我讲讲你自己吧。
t_en: Tell me about yourself.

t_ch: 我？我其实没什么故事可讲。毕竟我才不到四十岁，距离我们星球的成年还差了一半多呢。
t_en: Me? There's not much to say. At less than forty, I'm only halfway to being an adult on my planet.

t_ch: 我生在艺术世家，老爹却从来不让我动手创作。他说：「小树是不能结果子的。比起甘甜的红果，苦涩的青果既无价值，又会榨干潜力。」
t_en: I come from an artistic family, but my old man wouldn't let me create any work. "Young trees shouldn't bear fruit," he'd say. "Bitter green fruit is worthless and drains potential, unlike sweet ripe ones."

t_ch: 所以，我一直在欣赏别人的作品，没有半点产出。就像坐着别人的飞船横渡星海，却连船票都没买……
t_en: So I only watched others create works, never making my own. Like hitching a ride across the stars without paying for the ticket...

t_ch: 后来，星际和平公司的作品涌入星球，摧垮了老爹的心态。他不再嚷嚷着积累和艺术家的坚持，直接封笔隐退了，我也有了创作的自由。
t_en: Later, when IPC's works flooded our planet, it broke the old man. He quit talking about dedication and artistic integrity, and just retired completely. That's when I could finally create my own works.

t_ch: 但在决定做这部作品之前，我更多是个旁观者：看了许多别人的故事，自己却没有要表达的情感……
t_en: Before this project, I was just a spectator: hearing others' stories but having nothing of my own to say...

t_ch: 好在如今我还有机会补票，去成为那些伟大创作者的一员，把自己的名字填进片尾名单里…如果能做到的话。
t_en: But now I can finally pay my way, maybe join those great creators and see my name in the credits... if I made it.

t_ch: 我想问的差不多了。
t_en: Well, I think I've gotten to know you pretty well.

t_ch: 我还有大项目要谈，先走了。
t_en: I should get going — got some important business to discuss.

t_ch: 慢走，有空的时候记得回来看看我就行。
t_en: See you around. Feel free to visit anytime.

t_ch: 怎么样，还不赖吧？这只是教学关而已，后面会更加精彩。等你通关就知道了！
t_en: Pretty good, huh? And that's just the tutorial — wait till you see the rest. Clear it and find out!

t_ch: 对对，每个琥珀纪都会在庇尔波因特举办两次的那个。咱这游戏就是以它为灵感创作的。
t_en: That's right, the biannual event at Pier Point each Amber Era? That's what inspired this.

t_ch: 再加上星穹列车全明星，应该是能吸引不少玩家了吧，哈哈~
t_en: Throw in the Astral Express crew, and we've got ourselves a hit, haha~

t_ch: 我真的只用玩游戏就行了吗？
t_en: So all I have to do is play the game?

t_ch: 哈！不瞒你说，这台机器安装了业务巩固部的「截稿日辅助处理系统」。在你玩的同时，它会<color=#dbc291ff>搜集你们过去的开拓经历</color>，发给我当作参考。
t_en: Ha! Truth is, it's got the Business Consolidation Department's "Deadline Assistant Processing System." It <color=#dbc291ff>captures your past Trailblazing experiences</color>, sending them to me for reference.

t_ch: 可以说，你「玩游戏」的行为本身，就是在帮我完善它。你玩得越久，我就能积累越多的创作素材。
t_en: So really, just by playing, you're helping me improve the game. More gameplay gives me more material to work with.

t_ch: 如果想了解更多细节，之后可以随时找我，我会一五一十告诉你的。现在，你只需要享受游戏就好，其他的我来考虑。
t_en: If you need more details, ask away anytime — I'll explain everything. For now, just enjoy the game. I'll handle the rest.

t_ch: 我要怎样才算通关？
t_en: So how do I clear this game?

t_ch: 呃…当前版本的话，<color=#dbc291ff>就是多赚钱、提升会场等级</color>，让展会变得更加热闹。对你来说小菜一碟啦~
t_en: Um... in this version, you just need to <color=#dbc291ff>earn money and level up the venue</color> to make the exhibition bustling. Should be easy for you~

t_ch: 游戏，再启动！
t_en: Game on, again!

t_ch: 正式发行之后，请务必寄给我一份。
t_en: When it's officially published, please send a copy to me.

t_ch: 我对电子游戏没那么擅长，但也能感受到创作者的一些巧思。
t_en: I'm not great at video games, but I can pick up the brilliant ideas the creator incorporated.

t_ch: 哎呀，要算的数好多，头有点晕了……
t_en: Ah, I'm dizzy from all these calculations...

t_ch: 这游戏的设定，让我想起了公司旗下的「星际文明成果展示大会」。
t_en: This game's setting reminds me of IPC's "Interastral Civilization Achievement Exhibition."

t_ch: 不过眼下这款游戏还不够完善，需要你们多玩一玩、提点改进建议才行。
t_en: But this game is still incomplete, so I need all of you to play it more and offer me some feedback.

t_ch: 你为什么要做这款游戏？
t_en: Why do you want to make this game?

t_ch: 我的故乡帕拉黛，是一个信奉「纯美」的星球。我的家族原本是帕拉黛星最受欢迎的艺术世家，出产过许多剧作。
t_en: My home planet Paradoxe follows the Beauty above all else. My family used to be the most popular artistic aristocracy, and produced many theater works.

t_ch: 后来大伙都去看公司的《鸡窝头侦探》和《流星怪盗卢布朗》了，我们家也就逐渐没落了……
t_en: However, everyone watched the IPC's Tousled Detective and Leblanc: The Meteor Thief, so my family gradually declined...

t_ch: 为了振兴家族，我要推出一部叫好又叫座的作品——思来想去，没什么比星穹列车题材的游戏更合适了。
t_en: To rejuvenate the family, I need to make something that's both popular and meaningful — and I realized nothing would work better than a game about the Astral Express.

t_ch: 本姑娘不太适合需要动脑子的游戏…先撤了。
t_en: I'm not the right person for games that require me to rack my brains... I'll excuse myself.

t_ch: 很久没有这么畅快地玩过了…可惜，成年人的世界除了游戏以外还有许多东西。有空的时候我们再一起玩吧。
t_en: It's been a long time since I've had such fun... Unfortunately, there's much more for adults to do aside from gaming. Let's play together again when we have the time.

t_ch: 既然这是寄给{NICKNAME}的礼物，不如就由{F#她}{M#他}来主玩吧。在这方面，我相信{NICKNAME}的判断。
t_en: Since it's a gift for {NICKNAME}, why don't we let {F#her}{M#him} be the main player? In this aspect, I trust {NICKNAME}'s judgment.

t_ch: 那就交给你了帕。别担心，列车长会一直陪着你的。
t_en: Then we'll leave it to you. Don't worry, Pom-Pom will always be with you.

t_ch: 让我看看…很好，现在搜集到的反馈已经足够，应该能做出一部完整的作品了。
t_en: Hmm... looks like I've got all the feedback now. This should make for quite a story.

t_ch: 虽然早就从广播里听说了列车的经历，但亲自看上一遍，还是不禁感慨——你们的开拓之旅可真精彩啊。
t_en: You know, I'd already heard about the Express' experiences through broadcasts, but watching these stories firsthand? I'm still so impressed — Your trailblazing expedition is truly exciting.

t_ch: 果然，一颗星球上的故事终究有限。唯有奔向宇宙，才能知晓寰宇的精彩。
t_en: As expected, there are limits to the stories in a single planet. We can only discover the brilliance of the cosmos when we travel the universe.

t_ch: 等做完手头的工作，我会把这部作品分享给更多人。之后只需要静待反响就好了。
t_en: Once I finish the work on hand, I'll share this creation with more people. All I need to do next is to patiently wait for reactions.

t_ch: 我要先去完善游戏内容了。于星海再会吧，朋友。真希望有天，我们能亲眼见到彼此啊。
t_en: I'll go ahead and optimize the game content now. See you in the starry seas, friend. Maybe we'll meet in person one day.

t_ch: 哦对了，公司的货船得过段时间才能去回收这台设备。在那之前，你还可以继续玩我的游戏。
t_en: Oh, and the company's freight skiff won't pick up this device for some time. The game's yours to play until then.

t_ch: 晚上好，亲爱的{NICKNAME}！真是激动人心的久别重逢啊——能在这茫茫宇宙中屡屡相遇，果然你我之间缘分匪浅。
t_en: Good evening, {NICKNAME}, my dear! It's such an exhilarating reunion — being able to cross paths again and again in this vast universe, it seems we really have a special bond.

t_ch: 快来人啊，有愚者混进来了！
t_en: Someone help! A Fool has snuck in!

t_ch: 所以我该叫你同学，还是教授？
t_en: So, are you a classmate, or a professor?

t_ch: …我们很熟吗？
t_en: ...Do we know each other?

t_ch: 你一如既往的幽默可真令我倍感亲切，我亲爱的朋友。
t_en: Your humor, as always, is truly comforting, my dear friend.

t_ch: 虽然距离上次会面已过去了很久，但有句话说得好：「此时此刻，恰如彼时彼刻」——请看我身边的这台机器，你是否觉得有几分熟悉？
t_en: Though it's been a while since we last met, there's a saying that goes: "This moment is just like that moment back then" — look at the machine beside me. Doesn't it seem a little familiar to you?

t_ch: 我亲爱的朋友，你还记得那金色梦中的<color=#dbc291ff>《银河球棒侠传说》</color>吗？
t_en: My dear friend, do you still remember that golden dream of the Legend of the Galactic Baseballer?

t_ch: 那是什么？
t_en: What's that?

t_ch: 哈哈，既然如此，不如让我来帮你回忆一下吧——鄙人曾在匹诺康尼赞助过一个游戏项目，利用梦境中特有的技术，做出了全沉浸式的体验。
t_en: Haha. In that case, let me help jog your memory — back in the day, I funded a game project in Penacony, using unique dream-tech to create a fully immersive experience.

t_ch: 游戏的主角是一位小小的勇者，追寻着传说中的球棒踏出家乡，前往征服群星的道路……
t_en: The game's protagonist was a teeny hero, who set off from their hometown to find the legendary bat and conquer the stars...

t_ch: 付点朋友费就记得了。
t_en: Just a small fee from friends, and I'll remember it.

t_ch: 哈哈，我们不是老熟人了嘛。就让我来帮你回忆一下吧——鄙人曾在匹诺康尼赞助过一个游戏项目，利用梦境中特有的技术，做出了全沉浸式的体验。
t_en: Hahaha, aren't we old friends already? Let me help jog your memory — back in the day, I funded a game project in Penacony, using unique dream-tech to create a fully immersive experience.

t_ch: 游戏的主角是一位小小的勇者，追寻着传说中的球棒踏出家乡，前往征服群星的道路……
t_en: The game's protagonist was a teeny hero, who set off from their hometown to find the legendary bat and conquer the stars...

t_ch: 所以正式版终于上线了？！
t_en: So, the official version is finally live!?

t_ch: 没错！很高兴你还记得那位小小的勇者——
t_en: That's right! I'm glad you still remember that teeny hero—

t_ch: 或许你有听说，由于测试结果相当令人满意，玩家对后续作品的呼声很高。经过制作团队紧张的开发，游戏的正式版终于得以与广大玩家见面——
t_en: You might have heard that, thanks to excellent beta test results, players have been eagerly awaiting the next installment. After much hard work from the dev team, the official version was finally launched for the public —

t_ch: 在测试版的基础上，我们对项目整体进行了调优与迭代，并丰富和扩充了玩法功能。
t_en: We've optimized and iterated the overall project based on the beta while adding and expanding gameplay features.

t_ch: 作为青年才俊们的聚集地，折纸大学自然也是我们游戏的主要投放场所。如今《银河球棒侠传说：魔王篇》的游戏机就在眼前，不打算来体验一下吗？
t_en: As a hub for young talent, Paperfold University is naturally one of our primary launch locations. Now, the console for Legend of the Galactic Baseballer: Demon King is right in front of you. Don't you want to give it a go?

t_ch: 晚上好，亲爱的{NICKNAME}！真是激动人心的久别重逢啊——能在这茫茫宇宙中屡屡相遇，果然你我之间缘分匪浅。
t_en: Good evening, {NICKNAME}, my dear! It's such an exhilarating reunion — being able to cross paths again and again in this vast universe, it seems we really have a special bond.

t_ch: 快来人啊，有愚者混进来了！
t_en: Someone help! A Fool has snuck in!

t_ch: 所以我该叫你同学，还是教授？
t_en: So, are you a classmate, or a professor?

t_ch: …我们很熟吗？
t_en: ...Do we know each other?

t_ch: 你一如既往的幽默可真令我倍感亲切，我亲爱的朋友。
t_en: Your humor, as always, is truly comforting, my dear friend.

t_ch: 你知道的，有笑声的地方自然会有{RUBY_B#「愚者」}我{RUBY_E#}的身影，更何况我原本就在匹诺康尼投了一个项目。
t_en: You know, wherever there is laughter, there {RUBY_B#Fools}I{RUBY_E#} will be. Besides, I invested in a project here in Penacony already.

t_ch: 那是款名为<color=#dbc291ff>《银河球棒侠传说》</color>的游戏，由于之前的测试结果相当令人满意，玩家对后续作品的呼声很高。
t_en: That's a game called Legend of the Galactic Baseballer. Thanks to the excellent test results, players have been eagerly awaiting the next installment.

t_ch: 所以，经过制作团队紧张的开发，正式版终于得以与广大玩家见面——
t_en: So, after much hard work from the dev team, the official version has finally launched for the public —

t_ch: 《银河球棒侠传说》？
t_en: Legend of the Galactic Baseballer?

t_ch: 没错！游戏的主角是一位小小的勇者，追寻着传说中的球棒踏出家乡，前往征服群星的道路……
t_en: Exactly! The game's protagonist was a teeny hero, who set off from their hometown to find the legendary bat and conquer the stars...

t_ch: 有点可疑…
t_en: Sounds kinda sus...

t_ch: 朋友，谨慎是好事儿——但也可能让你错过许多乐子！
t_en: My friend, caution is a good thing — but it can also make you miss out on a whole lot of fun!

t_ch: 这名号听起来怎么有点耳熟…
t_en: Now why does that name sound familiar...

t_ch: 哦，当然，这个故事稍稍*致敬*了某位在银河间颇有名气的球棍使用者。你懂的——取材于现实，再加一点魔幻、一点荒诞…但请相信我，你会喜欢这款游戏的。
t_en: Oh, well, the story pays a bit of homage to a bat user who became famous throughout the cosmos. You know, it's based on reality, with a pinch of fantasy, and just a hint of absurdity thrown in... Believe me, you will love it.

t_ch: 在测试版的基础上，我们对项目整体进行了调优与迭代，并丰富和扩充了玩法功能。
t_en: We've optimized and iterated the overall project based on the beta while adding and expanding gameplay features.

t_ch: 作为青年才俊们的聚集地，折纸大学自然也是我们游戏的主要投放场所。如今《银河球棒侠传说：魔王篇》的游戏机就在眼前，不打算来体验一下吗？
t_en: As a hub for young talent, Paperfold University is naturally one of our primary launch locations. Now, the console for Legend of the Galactic Baseballer: Demon King is right in front of you. Don't you want to give it a go?

t_ch: 晚上好，{M#英俊的先生}{F#美丽的小姐}。久仰星穹列车大名，没想到竟有幸在此相遇……
t_en: Good evening, {M#dashing sir}{F#lovely miss}. I've heard so much about the Astral Express but never imagined meeting you here...

t_ch: 请允许我先进行一次自我介绍——鄙人名为乔瓦尼•迪•乔尔吉奥•达•艾普瑟隆，一介来自艾普瑟隆的小小私商。
t_en: Please allow me to introduce myself first: My humble name is Giovanni di Giorgio da Epsilon, and I'm a tiny private trader from Epsilon.

t_ch: 倘若你不介意，可否允许我占用你几分钟，来介绍一下鄙人在匹诺康尼赞助的游戏项目——<color=#dbc291ff>《银河球棒侠传说》</color>？
t_en: If you don't mind, can I take up a few minutes of your time? Allow me to introduce the game project I sponsor in Penacony — Legend of the Galactic Baseballer.

t_ch: 《银河球棒侠传说》？
t_en: Legend of the Galactic Baseballer?

t_ch: 没错！游戏的主角是一位小小的勇者，追寻着传说中的球棒踏出家乡，前往征服群星的道路……
t_en: Exactly! The game's protagonist was a teeny hero, who set off from their hometown to find the legendary bat and conquer the stars...

t_ch: 有点可疑…
t_en: Sounds kinda sus...

t_ch: 朋友，谨慎是好事儿——但也可能让你错过许多乐子！
t_en: My friend, caution is a good thing — but it can also make you miss out on a whole lot of fun!

t_ch: 有人抄袭我的名字！
t_en: Someone plagiarized my name!

t_ch: 请别急着下论断，我亲爱的朋友，关于这点…无论是艾普瑟隆的版权保护条例，还是匹诺康尼的知识产权登记表中，我们都没有找到关于「银河球棒侠」的登记。
t_en: Please don't jump to conclusions, my dear friend. About that... we haven't been able to find any registration for Galactic Baseballer in either Epsilon's copyright protection ordinances or in the Penacony registry of IP.

t_ch: 当然，或许我们可以用一种更委婉的表述方式——伟大的*致敬*。
t_en: Also, we prefer a more implicit way: a flattering homage.

t_ch: 我们利用梦境中特有的技术，做出了全沉浸式的体验——所以，没朋友也完全没关系，单人即可游玩！
t_en: We use unique Dreamscape tech to create a completely immersive experience — so, you don't even need friends to play it. It's a single-player game!

t_ch: 由于之前的测试结果相当令人满意，经过制作团队紧张的开发，正式版终于得以与广大玩家见面。
t_en: Thanks to excellent test results and the dev team's hard work, the official version has finally launched for the public.

t_ch: 在测试版的基础上，我们对项目整体进行了调优与迭代，并丰富和扩充了玩法功能。
t_en: We've optimized and iterated the overall project based on the beta while adding and expanding gameplay features.

t_ch: 作为青年才俊们的聚集地，折纸大学自然也是我们游戏的主要投放场所。如今《银河球棒侠传说：魔王篇》的游戏机就在眼前，不打算来体验一下吗？
t_en: As a hub for young talent, Paperfold University is naturally one of our primary launch locations. Now, the console for Legend of the Galactic Baseballer: Demon King is right in front of you. Don't you want to give it a go?

t_ch: 介绍下游戏内容？
t_en: Could you tell me about the game?

t_ch: 我想想…测试版中的故事是这样的：「小小的勇者辞别家乡，在无尽银河中漫游探险，寻找星际最强武器——传说中的球棒」。
t_en: Let me think... In the test version, the story goes like this: "The little hero bids farewell to their hometown and embarks on an endless adventure across the cosmos, seeking the strongest weapon — The legendary ball bat."

t_ch: 「在狡猾『公爵』的诡计下，正直的球棒侠一时不察，坠入了连通着茫茫多未知世界的黑洞。」
t_en: "Under the cunning tricks of the Duke, the righteous Baseballer is caught off guard and falls into a black hole that connects to countless unknown worlds."

t_ch: 而此次的冒险就将从这里开始——「在黑洞中，我们幸运的勇者反而因祸得福，知晓了最强球棒的真正所在——『黑斗篷魔王』的手中！」
t_en: And that's where the adventure begins — "In the black hole, our lucky hero, instead of perishing, discovers the true location of the Ultimate Bat — it's in the hands of the Black Cloak Demon King!"

t_ch: 「于是勇敢的球棒侠决定追寻魔王的足迹，向其发起挑战。」
t_en: "Thus, the brave Baseballer decides to follow the Demon King's trail and challenge them."

t_ch: 听起来是不是格外有趣？请相信——在制作游戏方面，我们团队是专业的。
t_en: Sounds pretty exciting, doesn't it? Believe me when I say — our team is professional when it comes to making games.

t_ch: 还能玩到测试版吗？
t_en: Can I still play the demo version?

t_ch: 当然！毕竟很多时候，游戏的DEMO版本也是种情怀的代表。
t_en: Of course! After all, the demo version of a game often holds a special place in the heart.

t_ch: 为了不让那些没能玩到的玩家留下遗憾，我们特意复刻了测试版，并将其命名为《银河球棒侠传说：启程篇》。
t_en: To make sure those who missed out don't feel left behind, we've recreated the beta version and named it Legend of the Galactic Baseballer: Departure.

t_ch: 请看那边的游戏机，对，就是显示「维修中」的那台——
t_en: Take a look at that console over there, the one that says "Under Maintenance" —

t_ch: 目前我们正在对测试版的数据进行最后调整，那台机器很快就能重新投入使用。
t_en: We're currently putting the final touches on the beta data. That machine will be up and running again very soon.

t_ch: 在此之前，我的朋友，不妨先去体验一下正式版的魅力吧？
t_en: Before that, my friend, why not dive into the charm of the official version?

t_ch: 通关后有报酬吗？
t_en: Are there any rewards for finishing it?

t_ch: 哈哈，请放心，诚如我们的某位开发者所言：「一切吝于给予玩家正反馈的游戏体验都是耍流氓！」
t_en: Haha, don't worry, as one of our developers likes to say: "A game that doesn't reward players properly is just cheating them!"

t_ch: 对此我深表赞同。所以除了随游玩进度解锁的奖励外，玩家还可以通过获得某些成就，来换取限定款浣熊头像周边。
t_en: I couldn't agree more. So, in addition to rewards unlocked as you progress, players can also earn exclusive raccoon-themed avatar merchandise by unlocking certain achievements.

t_ch: 如何，心动不如行动，快去体验一下吧？
t_en: How about it? Why not act on that impulse and give it a shot?

t_ch: 没什么想问的了。
t_en: That's all I wanted to know.

t_ch: 好的，这段时间我都会留在这里，有问题可以随时来找我。
t_en: Alright, I'll stay here. If you have any questions, feel free to come find me.

t_ch: 不过现在，与其继续听我在这里夸夸其谈，不如还是亲自上手体验一下吧，我的朋友。
t_en: But right now, instead of hearing me talk about it, why not experience it for yourself, my friend?

t_ch: 祝你游玩愉快！
t_en: Happy gaming!

t_ch: 嗯？还有什么问题吗？
t_en: Mmm? Any more questions?

t_ch: 介绍一下游戏内容？
t_en: Could you tell me about the game?

t_ch: 我想想…测试版中的故事是这样的：「小小的勇者辞别家乡，在无尽银河中漫游探险、寻找星际最强武器——传说中的球棒」。
t_en: Let me think... In the test version, the story goes like this: "The little hero bids farewell to their hometown and embarks on an endless adventure across the galaxy, seeking the legendary strongest weapon — the Bat."

t_ch: 「在狡猾『公爵』的诡计下，正直的球棒侠一时不察，坠入了连通着茫茫多未知世界的黑洞。」

t_en: And that's where the adventure begins — "In the black hole, our lucky hero, instead of perishing, discovers the true location of the Ultimate Bat — it's in the hands of the Black Cloak Demon King!"

t_en: "Thus, the brave Baseballer decides to follow the Demon King's trail and challenge them."

t_en: Haha, don't worry, as one of our developers likes to say: "A game that doesn't reward players properly is just cheating them!"

t_en: How about it? Why not act on that impulse and give it a shot?

t_en: That's all I wanted to know.

t_ch: 好的，这段时间我都会留在这里，有问题可以随时来找我。祝你游玩愉快！
t_en: Alright, I'll stay here. If you have any questions, feel free to come find me. Happy gaming!

t_ch: 哦，看样子你已经通关了——恭喜你，朋友，介意和我分享一下你的游戏体验吗？
t_en: Oh, looks like you've already finished it — congratulations! Mind sharing your thoughts on the game with me?

t_ch: 特别好评！
t_en: It's great!

t_ch: 哈哈，能够获得如此之高的评价，实在是我们的荣幸。感谢您对《银河球棒侠：魔王篇》的喜爱——
t_en: Haha, getting such high praise is truly an honor. Thank you for your love of Galactic Baseballer: Demon King—

t_ch: 对于一位愚者而言，人们的欢笑可是最诚挚的赞许与认可。
t_en: For a Fool, the laughter of people is the sincerest form of recognition.

t_ch: 完全没玩够啊…
t_en: I haven't played enough...

t_ch: 这个嘛，毕竟游戏的体量摆在那里…我个人对这个项目的定位是「贵精不贵多」——
t_en: Well, given the scope of the game... Personally, I've always considered this project to be "quality over quantity."

t_ch: 早在《银河球棒侠传说》立项之初，我们就将开发重点放在了游玩体验上，因此在正式版的制作中更注重玩法的打磨，希望能做到「小而精」，而非「量大管饱」。
t_en: We've focused on the player experience from the very start of Legend of the Galactic Baseballer's development. So we really perfected the gameplay for the official version, aiming for "small but refined," not "big and overwhelming."

t_ch: 说不好会收到律师函吗？
t_en: Could I get a lawyer's letter for saying I didn't like it?

t_ch: 哦…你提醒我了，我这就去联系法务部——
t_en: Oh... you've reminded me. I'll contact legal right away —

t_ch: 哈哈，开个玩笑。请放心，我们可是正经项目，从不搞那些邪门歪道。
t_en: Haha, just kidding. Don't worry, we are a legitimate project. We don't do anything underhanded.

t_ch: 毕竟，一款优秀的游戏从不惧怕意见与批评——恶意刷差评除外。
t_en: After all, a great game never fears feedback or criticism — except for maliciously negative reviews.

t_ch: 那么除此之外，在体验过全部流程之后，你对于本游戏还有什么疑问吗？
t_en: So, besides that, do you have any other questions after experiencing the whole game?

t_ch: 还会有续作吗？
t_en: Will there be a sequel?

t_ch: 就我个人而言，当然希望会有，无论是新作还是DLC。
t_en: Personally? I hope so, whether it's a new game or DLC.

t_ch: 不过这取决于游戏的销量与口碑——毕竟我是个商人，而你也清楚，在梦境里进行开发的费用可是极为高昂。
t_en: But that all depends on the sales and reception — after all, I'm a businessman, and you know how expensive it is to develop in the Dreamscape.

t_ch: 那个魔王是谁设计的…
t_en: Who designed that Demon King...

t_ch: 这个嘛…当然是你自己啊，我的朋友。
t_en: Well... of course, it was you, my friend.

t_ch: 为了增加游戏的代入感，我们在正式版中使用了最新的梦境技术，能够在玩家的潜意识中「打捞」出一些印象深刻的碎片，并以此为原型生成怪物或关卡。
t_en: To enhance the immersion, we've used the latest Dreamscape tech in the official version, which allows us to "extract" deep impressions from the player's subconscious and use them to create monsters or stages.

t_ch: 当然，请不用担心隐私问题——我们有专门的保密协议。要知道，无论作为一名愚者还是私商，「讲信誉」都是我最基本的准则。
t_en: But don't worry about privacy concerns — we have strict confidentiality agreements. Whether as a Fool or a private businessperson, "keeping one's word" is my fundamental principle.

t_ch: 为什么不是银河笔杆子侠？
t_en: Why not the Cosmos's Penman Hero?

t_ch: 关于这件事…其实我有认真考虑过，将笔刷作为武器确实是个有趣的设定，令人始料未及的剧情发展也非常符合我的审美。
t_en: About that... I seriously thought it over. A pen as a weapon is a fun idea, and the unexpected plot twists fit my aesthetic perfectly.

t_ch: 但考虑到我们游戏的核心玩法与之并不匹配，最终只能忍痛放弃了。
t_en: But considering the game's core mechanics, it just didn't quite match, so I had to reluctantly let it go.

t_ch: 嗯…不过或许这么说能让你感到好受些：「讲理的叫不醒装睡的，球棒底下出真知——战斗爽才是重点。」
t_en: Hmm... But maybe this will make you feel better: "Reasonable arguments can't wake those who pretend to sleep, but true wisdom comes from the bat — fighting is what truly matters."

t_ch: 没有什么疑问了。
t_en: I don't have any other questions.

t_ch: 最后一个问题——对于《银河球棒侠传说：魔王篇》，你还有什么期待？
t_en: Last question — what are you looking forward to in Legend of the Galactic Baseballer: Demon King?

t_ch: 剧情能长点不？
t_en: Can the story go on a little longer?

t_ch: 哈哈，下次一定、下次一定…如果游戏后续的反响足够好，我们可能会考虑开发同IP下的其它作品。
t_en: Haha, we'll definitely make it happen next time... if the response to the game is good enough, we might consider developing other works under the same IP.

t_ch: 或许其中就会有以剧情为主的类型也说不定——总要尝试些全新的赛道不是吗？
t_en: Maybe there'll even be one with more focus on the story — after all, we've got to try something new, no?

t_ch: 后续更新优化有保障吗？
t_en: Is there a guarantee for future updates and improvements?

t_ch: 当然，我们可不是那种圈完钱就跑路的无良开发商。
t_en: Of course, we're not the kind of shady developers who vanish into thin air after getting the money.

t_ch: 即便没办法像业界的某些知名项目那样，每年更新七八个大补丁，但日常的维护与优化还是没问题的。
t_en: Even if we can't churn out seven or eight major updates every year like some big-name projects, regular maintenance and optimization? That's no problem at all.

t_ch: 我现在就要玩下一作！
t_en: I want to play the next game now!

t_ch: 哈哈，借你吉言——请放心，如果后续有开发计划，我们一定会将其如期奉上。
t_en: Haha, I'll take that as a compliment — rest assured, if there's a development plan for the future, we'll definitely deliver it on time.

t_ch: 毕竟「跳票」这种事情，对商人的信誉而言可是百害而无一利的。
t_en: After all, delays are a reputation killer for any business. There's absolutely no benefit in that.

t_ch: 好，你的意见我都认真记下了，时间不早，我得赶回去和开发团队进行总结评估。
t_en: Got it, I've made note of your feedback. It's getting late, I need to head back and do a wrap-up with the dev team.

t_ch: 请允许我先行一步——当然，上线项目的持续运营很重要，我会在摊位附近留下一个全息投影，和我的手机直接相通，有什么疑惑尽管问便是。
t_en: Please, allow me to take my leave first — of course, the continued operation of the project is important. I'll leave a hologram projection near the booth, connected directly to my phone. If you have any questions, feel free to ask.

t_ch: 啊，还有…这个可不能忘：请收好，专门为「银河球棒侠」准备的额外大礼包——<color=#dbc291ff>「崇高道德的赞许」</color>！
t_en: Ah, and... can't forget this: Please accept the special bonus gift prepared for the Galactic Baseballer — <color=#dbc291ff>"Praise of High Morals"</color>!

t_ch: 你还是这么「欢愉」…
t_en: You're still as "Elating" as always.

t_ch: 哈哈，感谢你的赞美。这正是对{RUBY_B#「愚者」}我们{RUBY_E#}最好的褒奖。
t_en: Haha, thanks for the compliment. That's the best praise ever for {RUBY_B#the Fools}us{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 对了，<color=#dbc291ff>那台测试版的游戏机现在已经修好了</color>，你要是感兴趣，不妨再去体验一下？
t_en: By the way, <color=#dbc291ff>that test version of the game console has been fixed now</color>. If you're interested, you should give it another try!

t_ch: 我已经等不及啦！
t_en: I can't wait any longer!

t_ch: 好好好，下次一定…
t_en: Alright, alright, maybe next time for sure...

t_ch: 哈哈，祝你游玩愉快！那么，愿我们于欢声笑语中再会！
t_en: Haha, enjoy your gaming! Let's meet again in laughter and fun!

t_en: Mmm? Any more questions?

t_ch: 两台街机那个是哪个来着？
t_en: Which of the arcade machines is which again?

t_ch: 如果想体验最新的《银河球棒侠传说：魔王篇》，就认准这台；
t_en: If you want to experience the latest "Legend of the Galactic Baseballer: Demon King," look for this one.

t_ch: 要是想重温之前的《银河球棒侠传说：启程篇》，请使用这台。
t_en: If you want to relive the previous "Legend of the Galactic Baseballer: Departure," use this one.

t_ch: 那么，祝你游玩愉快~
t_en: So, enjoy your gaming~

t_ch: 没什么想问的了。
t_en: That's all I wanted to know.

t_ch: 好的，我的投影会一直在这里，有问题可以随时来找我。
t_en: Alright, my projection will be here. If you have any questions, feel free to come find me.

t_ch: 哪来的小东西，敢在我面前撒野……
t_en: Where did this little brazen dolt come from?

t_ch: 嘁，还以为是什么厉害对手，原来是只小浣熊。
t_en: Tch. And I thought it was some powerful opponent. It's just a little raccoon.

t_ch: 直面魔王的怒火吧！你就是虫子！
t_en: Face the rage of the Demon King, you worm!

t_ch: 你就只有这么点能耐吗，简直自寻死路！
t_en: Is this all you can do? You're just gonna die!

t_ch: 见识我真正的力量吧！
t_en: Face my true power!

s_en: Demon King's Minions: I'm The Bait
t_ch: 黑斗篷结界（低配版）——启动！
t_en: Black Cloak Zone (low-end edition) — Activate!

s_en: Demon King's Minions: I'm The Bait
t_ch: 什么银河球棒侠，不过如此嘛。来呀，继续打我啊！
t_en: Is this all the Galactic Baseballer is? Come! Keep fighting me!

s_en: Demon King's Minions: I'm The Bait
t_ch: 时间差不多咯…任务完成，打卡，下班！
t_en: Time's almost up... Job's done. Clocking out!

s_en: Demon King's Minions: I'm The Trap
t_ch: …还真给骗过来了？行吧，那就速战速决——大伙一起上，争取早点收工！
t_en: ...The trick worked? Well, let's end this then — Everyone, go get them together! We'll try to wrap this one up quick!

t_ch: …嘶…我只是想找份工作，没打算…送命啊……
t_en: ...Hiss ...I just wanted a job, not to... die...

t_ch: 我瞧瞧手表…啊，下班时间到了！不打了不打了，继续打也没加班费。撤退！
t_en: Lemme check the time... Ah, it's time to clock out! No more fighting! I won't get overtime pay anyway! Retreat!

s_en: Demon King's Minions: I'm The Bait
t_ch: 不是？！我的工作只是负责当诱饵啊。都下班了，你怎么还在追我！
t_en: Hey!? My job was just to be bait! I've gone off work, so stop chasing me!

s_en: Demon King's Minions: I'm The Bait
t_ch: ——永别了，世界！等等…工伤能申请赔偿的吧？
t_en: — Farewell, sweet world! Wait... Can I claim compensation for a work injury?

t_ch: 果然，你和其他想挑战我的人都不一样……
t_en: You are indeed different from all the others who've tried to challenge me...

t_ch: 你很勇敢，也有足够的智慧。踏遍整个银河，千辛万苦寻到这里，想必你也不希望草草收场吧？
t_en: You have both courage and wisdom. Having traversed the entire cosmos and found this place after many trials, you wouldn't want to wrap this up too quickly either, right?

t_ch: ——来，到我的王座前来，面对你命定的结局吧！
t_en: — Come before my throne, and face your destined end!

t_ch: …瞧啊。威震全银河的球棒侠，来到了我的王座前，想要发起挑战！
t_en: ...Look, the baseballer who's famous throughout the cosmos has arrived before my throne and intends to challenge me!

t_ch: 莫非…你真以为能胜得过我？
t_en: Could it be that you really believe... you can beat me?

t_ch: 先击碎我的防御再说吧！
t_en: Why don't you break my defense first?

t_ch: 斗篷…我最爱的斗篷…呜呜呜……
t_en: My cape... My favorite cape... Waaaaaah...

t_ch: 啊啊啊啊！我彻底破防了，作为代价，你将要承受失去心爱之物的魔王的怒火！
t_en: Aaaaaah! I've had enough. The price you must pay is to face the rage of the Demon King, who has lost his greatest love!

t_ch: 乖乖被我碾成灰吧！
t_en: Stand still and let me grind you into dust!

t_ch: 早就说过，你根本不是我的对手！
t_en: I've told you! You're no match for me!

t_ch: 既然你诚心诚意的发问了——
t_en: Prepare for trouble, since you asked nicely—

s_en: Demon King's Minions: Spray of Inspiration
t_ch: 我们就咕哩咕哩地告诉你！
t_en: And make it double, we'll tell you readily!

t_ch: 为了防止邪恶统治被破坏，为了守护世界的和平，我们要将你埋葬在这满是糖分的星球！
t_en: To protect the evil government from facing destruction! To uphold the peace within our population! We will bury you in this sucrose-filled planet!

t_ch: 一切献给——伟大的「黑斗篷魔王」！
t_en: All for... the great Black Cloak Demon King!
Bo... ss...

s_en: Demon King's Minions: Spray of Inspiration
t_ch: 挚友啊！你崇高的信念，就由我来继承——
t_en: My friend! I shall inherit the mantle of your noble belief —

t_ch: 我将解放银河间最为强大的力量……
t_en: I will release the most powerful force in the entire cosmos...

t_ch: 用你手中的球棒好好感受吧——这无尽的恨意！
t_en: Feel it with the bat in your hands — Feel this endless hatred!

t_ch: 啊…我的斗篷，真希望我们永远都不要分开……
t_en: Ahh... My cape... I wish we'll never part...

t_ch: 恭喜，你成功击败了魔王，但银河不会因此而变得和平…你的冒险，还没有结束……
t_en: Congrats, you've succeeded in defeating the Demon King, but the cosmos will not see peace... your adventures will continue...

t_ch: 呵。就到这吧，属于这个舞台的时间已经到了。
t_en: Heh. Let's call it a day here. This stage's time is up.

t_ch: 毁掉心爱斗篷的仇，我记下了。总有天，我会再来找你的……
t_en: I'll remember how you destroyed my beloved cape. One day, I'll come back for you...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}阁下，「极速杯」球笼竞速锦标赛已经拖了很久了，我们还在琢磨您要是不来这比赛可怎么办啊？
t_en: Dear esteemed {NICKNAME}, the "Speed Cup" Spheroid Racing tournament has been delayed for quite some time now. We were starting to wonder, "What would we do if you didn't show up for the race?"

t_ch: 还好您总算来了，我这就去宣布比赛正式开始！
t_en: Thankfully, you've showed up! I'll announce the official start of the race right away!

t_ch: 等等，这活动是什么情况？
t_en: What, what's up with this event?

t_ch: 什么什么情况？您不是报名了吗？奇怪，我这里明明有您的报名表啊？
t_en: What what what? Didn't you sign up? Strange, I have your name on the roster right here?

t_ch: 有奖金吗？有的话直接开始！
t_en: Is there a prize? If so, let's get started!

t_ch: 您真爽快，请随我来！
t_en: You're quick to the point. Please, follow me!

t_ch: 训练场已为您腾出来了，我带您试试车，对了，我看您的报名表上好像没登记赛车？奇怪，怎么查不到您提交的赛车信息，呃，您有准备自己的赛车吗？
t_en: The training grounds have been cleared for you. I'll take you for a test drive. By the way, I noticed that your registration form doesn't seem to list a race car. Strange, I couldn't find any record of you submitting one... Uh, did you bring your own car?

t_ch: 场地内突然响起震耳的广播通知。
t_en: A deafening broadcast announcement suddenly echoed across the venue.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「巡海大鲨鱼」号</color>选手已被取消参赛资格！
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>The contestant of Sea Hunter Shark</color> has been disqualified from the competition!

t_ch: …等等，我收到新消息。您认识「巡海大鲨鱼」选手吗？他想把赛车托付给您。
t_en: ...Wait, I just received new information. Do you know the contestant for Sea Hunter Shark? He wants to entrust his race car to you.

t_ch: 也算是赶巧了，我见您名下没有赛车，刚刚还在为您要用什么赛车而发愁呢。
t_en: Well, that's quite a coincidence. I just noticed you didn't have a registered race car and was wondering what you'd be driving.

t_ch: 就用它试训吧？我可以在旁指导您，帮您适应下它——毕竟是手动挡，你们年轻人可能用不惯。
t_en: Why not use it for a test run? I can guide you from the side and help you get used to it. After all, it's a manual transmission, and you younger folks might not be accustomed to that.

t_ch: 试训赛道已经准备好了，我们这就出发？
t_en: The test track is ready. Shall we head out now?

t_ch: 走走走！
t_en: Go, go, go!

t_ch: 稍等下，我还没准备好…
t_en: Hold on a moment, I'm not ready yet...

t_ch: 好的，您准备好了随时喊我就行。
t_en: Alright, just let me know when you're ready.

t_ch: …嗯？看您这表情，难道这报名表有问题？呃，现在比赛已经开始了，大家都在等您上场，您可千万别退赛啊，求求了！
t_en: ...Hm? Judging from your expression, might this list be wrong? Agh. The match is already starting, everyone is waiting for you to arrive. Please don't back out! Please!

t_ch: 这比赛等您系上安全带后立刻开始！怎么样，您方便落座吗？我们很着急。
t_en: The race will start as soon as you strap in! How do you like it? Ready to sit down? We're about to start.

t_ch: 别啰嗦了，直接开赛吧！
t_en: Enough about the chit-chat, just start the race already!

t_ch: 您准备好了我们这就开始。
t_en: We're ready to go as soon as you are.

t_ch: 稍等一下，让我缓一缓…
t_en: Hold on, let me catch my breath...

t_ch: 没人能靠踩刹车赢下比赛，您要是准备好了就来叫我吧。
t_en: No one's winning this race by tapping the brakes. If you're ready, just call out to me.

t_ch: 太棒了！您的驾驶天赋真是令人惊叹，完全不像是第一次驾驶球笼赛车。
t_en: Amazing! Your driving skills are impressive — this doesn't feel like your first time driving a Spheroid racer.

t_ch: 对了，您这辆<color=#dbc291ff>「巡海大鲨鱼」号</color>跟您报名登记的球笼时候不太一样，得亏是那位选手出了许多情况……
t_en: By the way, this <color=#dbc291ff>Sea Hunter Shark model</color> you've got here doesn't match the one you signed up with. Lucky for you, that other racer had some issues...

t_ch: 离下一场比赛还有些时间，请您稍事休息，等比赛开始了会有全场通知……
t_en: There's some time before the next race, so please take a break. We'll make a public announcement when the race starts...

t_ch: …报名？我什么时候报的名？
t_en: ...Sign up? When did I sign up?

t_ch: 您没报名？让我查一下…是这样的，您的报名是通过一个匿名终端完成的。
t_en: You didn't sign up? Let me check... Ah, it looks like your registration was done through an anonymous terminal.

t_ch: 哦！看来是有黑客帮您报的名。先说好，「极速杯」对此免责啊！
t_en: Oh! Looks like a hacker signed you up. Just so you know, "Speed Cup" takes no responsibility for that!
